## External Integrations (1)

External integrations that connect Rapid7 InsightConnect with TheHive:

### TheHive Extension
Rapid7 InsightConnect extension that enables automated workflows with TheHive for case management, alert handling, and incident response orchestration

- **Type:** extension
- **Documentation:** [https://extensions.rapid7.com/extension/thehive](https://extensions.rapid7.com/extension/thehive)
